# Trace-lit

> Trace-lit is an open-source AI agent observability and monitoring platform. It covers the full improvement loop for teams building with LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, or any OpenTelemetry-compatible framework.

## What it does

Trace-lit gives AI agent teams five capabilities in one platform:

1. **Observe** — traces every agent run in real time: model calls, token counts, latency, USD cost per step.
2. **Debug** — automatic root cause attribution identifies which step caused a failure and which downstream steps cascaded.
3. **Version** — every prompt change is tracked by content hash. Any two versions can be compared side by side with a line diff.
4. **Curate** — spans from production traces can be tagged as good, bad, or neutral to build a labeled evaluation dataset. Datasets export as JSONL.
5. **Gate** — a CI quality gate scores a new prompt version against the dataset. One curl command returns pass/fail with a numeric score.

## Key features

- OTel native: point any OpenTelemetry-instrumented agent at Trace-lit with two environment variables — no code changes required
- autopatch(): one-line wrapper for the OpenAI and Anthropic SDKs — automatically captures model, tokens, and cost
- Failure attribution: rule-based, no external LLM required, fully air-gapped
- Dataset builder: inline tagging from the trace detail view, JSONL export
- CI quality gate: error rate, cost, and duration scorers; enterprise tier adds LLM-as-judge
- I/O capture: stores full LLM input/output per span; enterprise redaction strips PII and secrets before storage
- Self-hosted: single `docker compose up` — Kafka, ClickHouse, TimescaleDB, FastAPI, React dashboard

## Supported frameworks

LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, OpenAI SDK (Python), Anthropic SDK (Python), any OpenTelemetry SDK

## Pricing

- **Community** — $0, self-hosted forever, full platform, no limits
- **Cloud** — $49/month, fully managed, 99.9% SLA
- **Enterprise** — custom pricing; adds AI failure analysis (local Ollama), I/O PII redaction, LLM-as-judge eval scoring, SSO, audit logs, air-gapped deployment support

## Links

- Homepage: https://trace-lit.com
- App / sign up: https://app.trace-lit.com/signup
- GitHub (SDK + server): https://github.com/Sedrah/Trace-lit-SDK
